name: item_price_band_classifier
description: Use the item price-band classifier to identify rows in the high current-price bucket.
sql_predicate: CASE WHEN i_current_price < 20 THEN 0 WHEN i_current_price < 50 THEN 1 WHEN i_current_price < 100 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END = 3

name: item_manager_classifier
description: Use the item manager classifier to identify rows assigned to manager class 42.
